titlestmt.titleproper: School of Hotel Administration Directors records28-1-1803
titlestmt.author: Compiled by E. Engst

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-02-10 23:11:56 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: School of Hotel Administration Directors records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Director

did.physdesc: Correspondence, files, albums, records, reports, meeting minutes, plaques.
did.abstract: Records of the Director's Office and of Howard B. Meek include registration reports as well as school budgets, minutes of faculty and staff meetings, and reports.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Directors and deans represented include Howard B. Meek, Robert A. Beck, and John J. Clark.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series II. Howard B. Meek files Boxes 1, 4-11

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: School of Hotel Administration Director's records, #28-1-1803. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Records of the Director's Office include correspondence files, including letters from Joseph Vehling, Martha Van Rensselaer and Flora Rose; biographical files; and subject files, including files of the Courtney Memorial Fund. Records of Howard B. Meek include registration reports, with letters to Meek; correspondence; items relating to a Hotel School European tour; and plaques and awards given to Meek. Also, school budgets, 1954-1978; minutes of faculty and staff meetings, 1935-1981; report of the Education Committee of the American Hotel Association, 1944; and minutes of Deans' Council meetings, 1968-1970.

controlaccess.subject: Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
Hotel management -- Study and teaching.

did.unittitle: Subseries II. Biographical files (list of folder contents in front of each file)
Gibson, A.W. and Student War Service Committee
"Impact of Hotel School Alumni Felt throughout the World," by Frank Ready
First explanatory conference on research in fields related to the operation of hotels
First explanatory conference on research in fields related to the operation of hotels
Reports on Student Registration submitted to the Dean
Series II. Howard B. Meek files
OPA (Office of Price Administration) and Palmer, Archie M.
Minimum Wage Board, New York State Department of Labor
Buying retirement on the loss of state status
Binder with plates from the Edgewater Beach Salad Book by Arnold Shircliffe, presented to the Meeks
Participants and prospects, correspondence re European hotel and restaurant executives tour
Scroll signed by members of the New York Branch of the Cornell Society of Hotel Men, in appreciation of Meek's 10th Anniversary of starting the Hotel Course
Certificate signed by the Governor of Nebraska, appointing him Admiral in the Navy of Nebraska
Pacific Air Force plaque for Outstanding Service Open Mess Training Course at the Imperial Hotel - Tokyo, Japan
Hotel Association of Washington, D.C. - plaque for outstanding service
"The Southern Exposition for Hotels, Motels and Restaurants" - Appreciation plaque
Texas Hotel and Motel Association, Distinguished Service Award
New York State Hotel Association, honorary life membership card
"The Growth of an Idea," scrapbook documenting the first 25 years of the Hotel School
"Testimonial Dinner in Honor of Dean Howard Bagnall Meek," scrapbook
"Meekbake," The New England Chapter of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen, scrapbook
"Testimonial Dinner in Honor of Dean Howard B. Meek," scrapbook
"Professor Howard Bagnall Meek," testimonial dinner, Mayflower Hotel (album)
Certificate of appreciation from Cornell Society of Hotelmen
"A Pictorial Commemorative of the visit of Professor H.B. Meek and the Graduating Class of the Hotel Administration of Cornell University to the Greenbriar..." (photograph album)
Loose material from testimonial dinner album, including photographs
Hotel management clippings, Bureau of Good Ideas
Certificate in Spanish given to Meek (1951); Signed photo (1932); Slide of Mr. and Mrs. Meek
